creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have reinstalled the machine giving me this problem from scratch. Before getting this issue the machine was crashing on boot or shutdown but I never grabbed one of those.

After reinstalling it it is having sporadic panics related to OpenZFS

I've created bug #249985 with data on these periodic panics.

I suspect the two issues to be related in some way, for example the panicss I'm now getting could end up putting the pool in the state to create the bug described here.
